title: KAWAHA 71/60KD-5SK Stainless Steel D-Shaped Heavy Duty Padlock with Key for Garage Door, Containers, Shed and Warehouse (2-3/4 inch, Keyed Different - 5 Stainless Steel Keys)
features: [APPLY TO ALL WEATHER & ANTI-CORROSION] Performs well even under the extreme environments as lock body, shackle & cylinder cover are made of anti-rust SUS304 stainless steel which is waterproof and is high resistance in rusty.

[ULTIMATE SECURITY] Protect your assets as with anti-pry double-ball locking against more than 4 ton pulling. This high security padlock with key is heel-toe locking with a freely rotating stainless steel shackle which leaves no weak spots on the locks and prevents attacks by cutting or sawing.

[STRONG & STURDY STRUCTURE] Both stainless steel lock body and shackle provide maximum corrosion protection during outdoor or indoor use. Special weatherproof anti-thief and anti pry disc cylinder make it perfectly suit your needs in high security.

[PADLOCK APPLICATION] Its unique "D" shape make it the perfect solution for securing Container, Storage, Shutter, Garage Door, Gate, Fence, Shed Lock, Lorry door, Warehouse, Iron door, wooden door etc. **PLEASE CHECK THE BOLT SIZE MEET YOUR REQUIREMENTS.

**Key can only be removed after the padlock is 1) fully locked and 2) fully open (key rotated 180 degrees). Padlocks supplied Keyed Different with 5 stainless steel keys each. (Other options in sizes and keyed alike are also available to suit your needs.)
description: Product Name: KAWAHA 71 / 60 D-Shaped Padlock Material: Stainless Steel Size: lock length 2-3/8 in. (60mm)* lock width 2 in. (50mm)* lock thickness 3/4 in. (20mm). Bolt thickness: 3/8 (9 mm) **PLEASE CHECK THE BOLT SIZE MEET YOUR REQUIREMENTS Weight: 390g Widely used: Widely used: indoor and outdoor (e.g. Containers, Shutter, Garage Door, Gate, Fence, Shed, Lorry door, Warehouse, Iron door, wooden door etc.) Packing: Padlock *1 + Stainless Steel key * 5 KAWAHA 71 / 60 D-Shaped Padlock features a 2-3/8 in.(60mm) wide stainless steel body for maximum strength, reliability and corrosion resistance. The 3/8 in.(9mm) diameter shackle is 1 in. (25mm) wide and made of SUS 304 stainless steel, offering extra resistance to cutting and sawing. The 12 pcs cylinder discs prevent prying as with strong stainless steel anti-pry cylinder cover. KAWAHA Heavy Duty Padlock is widely used in household, commercial and industrial locations. KAWAHA 71 / 60 D-Shaped Security Padlock has a freely rotating, 3/8 in. stainless steel shackle that can be applied vertically or horizontally on storage or shipping containers. The shackle has no springs to bind up or corrode over time. Keyed Alike and Keyed Different are available
